'''Tagoonta''' was a [[Shell Hutts|Shell]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who ran a small criminal empire. He fled [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] rule, and had a base in the abandoned [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cargo-transfer station|transfer station]] on the [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] [[Murk (planetoid)|Murk]].<ref name="Gamer 9" />

{{Char-stub}}
